steps.title: Connect finding to conclusion
steps.content: The first sentence says common pool resources can be sustainably managed by the people who use them. The next sentence says Alvarez's work repudiates the tragedy of the commons because that theory predicts inevitable overexploitation.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals contrast, B introduces an example, and C introduces a concession. The second sentence is a logical result of the first: evidence of sustainable management refutes a theory of inevitable overuse. The answer is D.
